primary_sources.title: ROS registration 2015; refounding 2018 with Bersatu and Amanah as full members
PH founding statement, 22 September 2015 (multiple wire reports)

notes: Successor to Pakatan Rakyat (2008-2015, which dissolved after PAS departure). Won GE14 (2018) — first federal alternation. Government fell February 2020 (Sheraton Move). Returned via Unity Govt arrangement with BN and East Malaysia post-GE15 (2022). Current PM is from PH (Anwar/PKR). Member parties: PKR, DAP, Amanah, Bersatu (until 2020 exit), UPKO.
